expectations.text: Stories are grouped by persona (enterprise IT admin for SSO, individual user for magic link/password)
expectations.evidence: Output groups stories into 4 epics: 'Epic 1: SSO Authentication (Enterprise IT Admin)', 'Epic 2: Magic Link Authentication (Individual User)', 'Epic 3: Password Authentication (Individual User)', 'Epic 4: Cross-Flow Integration'. Personas are clearly labeled.

expectations.text: SSO, magic link, and password are separate epics or story groups
expectations.evidence: Three separate epics: Epic 1 (SSO, Stories 1-3), Epic 2 (Magic Link, Stories 4-5), Epic 3 (Password, Stories 6-8). Plus Epic 4 for cross-flow integration.

expectations.text: Each story is completable in 1-3 days by one engineer
expectations.evidence: All stories sized S (1 day or 1-2 days) or M (2-3 days). Sprint plan allocates across 3 engineers. No story exceeds 3 days.

expectations.text: Acceptance criteria use Given/When/Then format or equivalent testable statements
expectations.evidence: All ACs use 'Given X, when Y, then Z' format throughout all 11 stories. Each is independently testable.

expectations.text: Error states are covered for each auth flow (invalid credentials, expired links, SSO provider down)
expectations.evidence: SSO: malformed URL (S1), provider rejects (S2), provider down (S3). Magic link: expired (S5), reused (S5), tampered (S5), rate limit (S4), email service down (S4). Password: invalid creds (S7), lockout (S7), expired reset (S8). Comprehensive coverage.
